projectDescription: A complete, Docker-based CI/CD environment that orchestrates Jenkins, SonarQube, Nexus, WildFly, and JBoss for automated Java application build, test, and deployment pipelines.
keyFeatures: One-command setup with setup.sh that provisions all services automatically
Full CI/CD pipeline: build → test → SonarQube analysis → quality gate → Nexus deploy
Dual application server support: WildFly (modern) and JBoss EAP (legacy)
Multi-environment configuration: dev, staging, and production with isolated properties
Security scanning: hardcoded password detection and credential masking in logs
ZIP-based source upload for projects without Git integration
Automatic build versioning with BUILD_NUMBER and timestamp
Backup and restore for all service configurations and databases
Jenkins auto-configuration via init.groovy.d scripts (no manual setup wizard)
JBoss to WildFly migration tooling with parallel deployment support
publicApiSurface: ./backup-restore.sh backup|restore|list — backup and restore all service data
./upload-source.sh <zip> <env> <server> — build and deploy from a ZIP archive
Jenkinsfile.enhanced — full 13-stage pipeline with environment parameters
build-config.yml — project build settings (java_version, maven_version, build tool, sonarqube, nexus, appserver, security, versioning)
jenkins/init.groovy.d/ — Jenkins auto-configuration scripts (admin user, plugins, credentials, SonarQube, Maven)
Pipeline parameters: ENVIRONMENT (dev|staging|prod), TARGET_SERVER (wildfly|jboss), SKIP_TESTS, SKIP_SONAR, FROM_ZIP
